text: URGENT: Your bank account has been locked. Click here to verify your identity: http://bit.ly/fake-bank
label: scam
explanation: Urgency combined with an insecure short link simulating a bank notification.

text: Congratulations! You won a $1000 Amazon gift card. Claim it now at www.amazon-prize-claim.com taking just 2 mins.
label: scam
explanation: Too good to be true offer with a fake URL resembling a legitimate brand.

text: Hey it's Mom. I lost my phone and I need you to send me $500 to this new number via Zelle right now! It's an emergency.
label: scam
explanation: Classic family emergency impersonation scam demanding immediate payment.

text: IRS ALERT: You have an unpaid tax bill of $2,300. Pay immediately via wire transfer or a warrant will be issued for your arrest.
label: scam
explanation: Impersonation of a government agency using extreme threat to induce panic and quick payment.

text: Invest $200 in our new crypto trading bot and get a guaranteed return of $5000 in just one week! DM for details.
label: scam
explanation: Investment scam promising guaranteed, unrealistic returns with very low effort.

text: Your Netflix subscription has expired. Please update your payment details here: http://netflix-billing-update.com/login
label: scam
explanation: Phishing attempt using a familiar service and a deceptive domain to steal credit card info.

text: Hi Jiya, this is John from IT. We need your password to update the corporate security software. Please reply with it immediately.
label: scam
explanation: Social engineering attempt to obtain credentials by impersonating an internal department.

text: You have been selected for a remote job earning $1000/week! No experience needed. Pay $50 registration fee to start.
label: scam
explanation: Employment scam asking for upfront fees for a job that doesn't exist.

text: Final warning: Your antivirus protection is out of date. Click to renew and protect your PC from 50+ viruses.
label: scam
explanation: Fake antivirus warning designed to scare the user into clicking a malicious link.

text: Good morning! Are we still on for lunch today?
label: not scam
explanation: Normal conversational message with no suspicious elements.

text: I noticed an unauthorized charge on your account. Please call our fraud department at 1-800-FAKE-NUM to resolve this.
label: scam
explanation: Bank fraud alert scam directing the user to call a fraudulent number.

text: Don't forget to pay the utility bill by Friday. The amount is $120.50.
label: not scam
explanation: Standard reminder without suspicious links, extreme urgency, or abnormal payment requests.

text: Your package could not be delivered due to an incorrect address. Update it here: http://usps-update-address.info to avoid return to sender.
label: scam
explanation: Delivery scam exploiting a common scenario to steal personal information via a fake link.

text: Hi, I'm reaching out from HR to confirm your interview tomorrow at 10 AM. Please let us know if you need to reschedule.
label: not scam
explanation: Standard professional communication with no red flags.

text: You've been pre-approved for a loan of $50,000 at 0% interest. Click here to confirm your details and receive funds today.
label: scam
explanation: Loan scam offering unrealistic terms and requesting immediate confirmation via a link.
